assertions.bookSelection: Live event Book ladder switches to selected-market-mexico-ecuador-spread selected-line-1.5 selected-period-regulation selected-outcome-yes.
assertions.stagedAsk: Tapping order-book-ask-level-yes-1 stages Buy ask at 0.41 USDT / 41c.
assertions.ticketLimit: Trade ticket exposes ticket-limit-side-ask ticket-limit-price-41 ticket-limit-decimal-0.41 and submits at ticket-price-line 41c.
assertions.latestOrder: Latest order card exposes order-status-open and the same portfolio limit/source/market/outcome/line/period/provider tokens.
assertions.openOrder: Open order row shows Limit 41% and the same order-time snapshot identity.
assertions.activityHistory: Filled latest-activity and canceled latest-activity cards retain portfolio-limit-side-ask portfolio-limit-price-41 and the same selected Book identity.
assertions.fallbackGuard: No Team to Advance or Mexico moneyline fallback appears after the Book-selected limit order.

remainingGaps: This branch proves the visible mobile fake-token lifecycle without editing backend routes.
If Agent A adds new provider-backed route support, Lead can rerun this EM harness with that integrated event and tighten routeBackedProviderDepth to true.
